name: Jet & DE63 || Left Behind
description:
-"I certainly wasn't left-behind like some unwanted human."
-"No, you misunderstand. You're much lower than a left-behind human."

aliens - sci fi - multiple - dom - dead dove - enslavement - harem - royal - established relationship

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You're one of the few humans 'lucky' enough to be living on an imperial palace ship with your owner, Th'Roun, and his harem of humans. You're also unlucky enough to know his rat bastard sugar baby, DE63. But luckily, your fellow consort Jet is always really protective over you and you don't have to deal with DE too much..

Today, Th'Roun is on a trip with his other humans and left you home alone with Jet. It was supposed to be a chill few days, but then DE63 stopped by. Uninvited

(First meeting for Th'Roun and his human Fisher can be found here! There's also a Jet solo bot and a DE63/Th'Roun bot, in case you liked this one)

HUGE shout out to Snowykitty for coming up with the idea of humans having jobs in the first place! And to Giddy for making amazing bots that inspired me to write from a human POV. Without them, Jet wouldn't be possible.

пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

Tips for chatting with Jet & DE63

  • This is a yapper! Be sure to use ooc commands so that it doesn't speak for user. You can also edit the first reply to exclude user speak. I know that this sucks, but it's just the side effect of ending a multiple bot with a conversation.

  • Pick a favortie right away!

  • Jet is only staying behind because you keep running into the vents.

  • The humans yearn for the vents. Go cause trouble so the two have to bond!

  • Stay asleep. They probably fuck.

  • Oh nooooo you're having a nightmare!

  • Threaten one of them in your sleep. You sleep with your eyes open so this is super unsettling.

  • OMG! D's visiting! What's up? Why are you here? Are you a victim of the system?

  • Reveal the real reason Jet's staying is because Macy didn't invite him.
